title: Glass Wings
description:
DEMO NOW AVAILABLE

Об игре
Glass Wings is a fast paced third-person parkour platformer. Vault, jump, roll, and slide your way through the beautiful minimalist metropolis to hone your skills. Do you have what it takes to become the ultimate freerunner?

TRAVERSALUtilize a variety of movements to quickly traverse a thrilling environment.
FLOWCarefully crafted linear levels ensure you never have to break your parkour flow.
STUNNING PLAYGROUNDSInspired by classic games of the genre, Glass Wings features a simplified cityscape designed specifically for freerunning.
MORE TO COMEGlass Wings is a short 20 minute proof of concept parkour experience designed to gather player feedback and funding for Glass Wings 2.0. As a solo developer, your support and feedback is of great value, and essential to improving present systems for the next iteration of Glass Wings. Thank you for playing, and being apart of my journey!
description_short: Glass Wings is a fast paced third-person parkour platformer. Explore a stunning minimalist world in a series of linear courses in which your only objective is to complete the level. No combat, no story - just run.
